summary: Phase 2 Frontend & Backend Testing: Yellow List tab rename, Mark Working date/time picker, ASUP Reject button/flow, InspectionPage rectified_on picker. All 16 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified with Playwright.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} in all Dialog components. Accessibility issue — add a <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby prop to suppress.

InspectionPage: Rectified On date picker button (line 658) and time input (line 677) have no data-testid attributes — harder to automate/test. Consider adding data-testid='rectified-on-date-btn' and data-testid='rectified-on-time-input'.

test_results.tab_yellow_list_visible: PASS — Tab at data-testid='tab-yellow-list' shows 'Yellow List (N)'; old 'Pending' tab does NOT exist
test_results.mark_working_dialog_date_picker: PASS — data-testid='marked-working-date-btn' shows current date (e.g. '06 May 2026') defaulting to today
test_results.mark_working_dialog_time_input: PASS — data-testid='marked-working-time-input' shows current time (HH:MM) defaulting to now
test_results.mark_working_flow_item_moves_to_yellow: PASS — After submitting Mark Working, item moved from Orange tab to Yellow List (count updated)
test_results.mark_working_toast: PASS — Toast 'Asset marked as working — pending ASUP approval' shown
test_results.supervisor_no_approve_reject_on_yellow: PASS — Supervisor does NOT see Approve/Reject buttons on Yellow List items
test_results.asup_approve_button_visible: PASS — data-testid='orange-list-approve-button' visible for ASUP on Yellow List items
test_results.asup_reject_button_visible: PASS — data-testid='orange-list-reject-button' visible for ASUP on Yellow List items
test_results.reject_confirm_disabled_when_no_remarks: PASS — Confirm Reject button disabled when remarks textarea is empty
test_results.reject_confirm_enabled_after_remarks: PASS — Confirm Reject button enabled after typing remarks
test_results.reject_flow_item_returns_to_defective: PASS — After ASUP reject, Yellow List count decreased; Red List count increased; Toast 'Rectification rejected — asset returned to defective'
test_results.approve_still_works: PASS — ASUP approve still works; Toast 'Asset approved as working — removed from list'; Yellow List count decreased
test_results.inspection_rectified_on_picker_visible: PASS — 'Rectified On (Date & Time)' picker appears in Inspection Details when defective asset status is set to OK
test_results.rectified_on_picker_hides_on_not_ok: PASS — Picker disappears when status changed to Not OK
test_results.rectified_on_picker_reappears_on_ok: PASS — Picker reappears when status changed back to OK
test_results.backend_mark_working_custom_timestamp: PASS — POST /api/orange-list/{id}/mark-working accepts and stores marked_working_at custom timestamp
test_results.backend_reject_working_resets_fields: PASS — POST /api/orange-list/{id}/reject-working sets status=defective, clears marked_working_by + marked_working_at, stores rejection_remarks
test_results.backend_reject_non_asup_403: PASS — Supervisor trying to reject gets 403
test_results.backend_full_flow: PASS — defective -> mark working (custom ts) -> pending_approval -> ASUP reject -> defective confirmed

action_items: LOW: Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to all DialogContent components in OrangeListPage.js and other pages to fix accessibility warning
LOW: Add data-testid='rectified-on-date-btn' and data-testid='rectified-on-time-input' to InspectionPage.js rectified_on pickers (lines 658 and 677) for testability
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 features correctly implemented. No critical bugs found.
The errString helper is used correctly in OrangeListPage for error handling.
ASUP station scoping works correctly for both reject-working and approve endpoints.
The full flow (SUP mark → pending_approval → ASUP reject → defective) correctly resets marked_working_by, marked_working_at and sets rejection_remarks.
seed_data_creation: Testing created/consumed several orange list state changes. Final state: multiple items remain in Yellow List and Orange/Red lists. Net effect: some FAN-11 items were marked working (pending_approval) then rejected/approved during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 fully tested. All features working: Yellow List tab (renamed from Pending), Mark Working with custom date/time, ASUP Reject button + flow, InspectionPage Rectified On picker. Only minor action items: DialogContent accessibility warning and missing data-testid on rectified_on pickers in InspectionPage. Backend tests in test_phase2_features.py (16 tests, all passing).
